zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡偏多整理
zh.content:
当前ETH价格围绕1683附近极窄区间运行，日内波动几乎收敛，市场进入典型横盘整理结构。价格仍稳站20日均线之上，短线整体略偏多，但上行动能释放有限，方向尚未明确。

从指标来看，MACD维持在零轴上方且数值为正，说明多头动能仍在延续，但信号线缺失使趋势确认不足。RSI暂不可用，但结合价格结构判断，动能处于中性偏强状态，缺乏加速迹象。

支撑方面，1679一线为20日均线关键防守位，其下1675构成次级支撑。阻力集中在1684近期高点，若有效突破则有望测试1692甚至1700整数关口，形成短线扩展空间。

交易策略上建议以区间思路为主，靠近1679-1675分批低吸更优，止损控制在1670下方；若放量突破1684，可顺势追多，目标上看1692-1700区域，等待方向选择确认。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is currently exhibiting an extremely tight consolidation phase around 1683, with price action compressing into a narrow intraday range. Volatility has contracted significantly, suggesting market participants are awaiting a catalyst for directional movement. Despite the near-flat 24h change, structure remains mildly constructive as price holds above short-term support. This kind of price compression often precedes a breakout or breakdown, making the current zone technically sensitive.

Indicators reinforce a neutral-to-slightly bullish bias. The SMA(20) at 1679.725 is acting as immediate dynamic support, with price trading just above it, indicating short-term equilibrium. MACD reading of 3.29 suggests modest positive momentum, though the absence of a signal line limits confirmation strength. Without RSI data, momentum assessment leans on price structure, which remains balanced and lacking clear overbought or oversold pressure.

Key support is concentrated at the SMA(20) region near 1679–1680, which aligns closely with the recent session lows. A break below this zone could expose a deeper retracement toward the 1665 area. On the upside, immediate resistance is seen at 1684–1686, followed by a stronger ceiling near 1695. The current tight range suggests liquidity buildup around these boundaries. Traders should monitor volume for confirmation of any breakout attempt.

Trading strategy favors short-term range-bound approaches until a decisive breakout occurs. Scalpers may consider buying near 1679 support with tight stops below 1677, while selling near 1684–1686 resistance for quick reversals. Given the compressed volatility, risk-reward improves only when entries are disciplined. A sustained move above resistance would shift bias bullish, while a breakdown below support would turn sentiment cautious.
